name: Chinese Pasta Salad with Creamy Ginger Dressin
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the marinade ingredients in a small bowl and add shrimp. Blanch the noodles, rinse under cool water, and sprinkle with sesame seed oil; toss, and set aside.
2. Trim noodles with scissors to about 4 inches in length for easier serving.
3. Blanch whole snow peas and set aside.
4. Heat wok, add 1 tablespoon oil. When oil is hot, add shrimp and stir-fry until pink. Set aside.
5. For the dressing: In a blender or food processor, mix ginger, garlic, egg yolk, egg white, and lemon juice. Slowly drizzle in oil. Mix in soy sauce and cream; set aside.
6. Toss noodles, shrimp, and snow peas. Add dressing to taste.
7. Garnish with scallions and coriander.
8. Serve at room temperature.
